{{ 'INVENTORY.TITLE' | translate }} - {{ 'INVENTORY.DETAILS' | translate }}

@if (loading) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.LOADING' | translate }}
} @if (error) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.LOADING_ERROR' | translate }}
} @if (!loading && equipment) {

{{ equipment.model }}

{{ 'RENTAL_STATUS.' + equipment.status | translate }}
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.TYPE' | translate }} {{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + equipment.equipmentType | translate }}
{{ 'INVENTORY.EQUIPMENT_BARCODE_ID' | translate }} {{ equipment.barcodeId }}
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SKILL_LEVEL' | translate }} {{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + equipment.targetSkillLevel | translate }}
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.PRICE' | translate }} {{ equipment.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':(translateService.currentLang || 'de') }}
@if (equipment.equipmentType === EquipmentType.SKI || equipment.equipmentType === EquipmentType.POLE || equipment.equipmentType === EquipmentType.SNOWBOARD) { {{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.LENGTH' | translate }} {{ equipment.length }} cm } @if (equipment.equipmentType === EquipmentType.HELMET) { {{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SIZE' | translate }} {{ equipment.size }} (cm) } @if (equipment.equipmentType === EquipmentType.SKIBOOT) { {{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.SOLE_LENGTH_MM' | translate }} {{ equipment.soleLengthMm }} mm } @if (equipment.equipmentType === EquipmentType.SNOWBOARD) { } @if (equipment.equipmentType === EquipmentType.SNOWBOARDBOOT) { {{ 'EQUIPMENT_CREATE.LACING_SYSTEM' | translate }} {{ equipment.lacingSystem || '-' }} }
}

{{ 'INVENTORY.RESERVATIONS_TITLE' | translate }}

@if (reservationsLoading) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.RESERVATIONS_LOADING' | translate }}
} @if (reservationsError) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.RESERVATIONS_ERROR' | translate }}
} @if (!reservationsLoading && !reservationsError) { @if (reservations.length === 0) {

{{ 'INVENTORY.NO_RESERVATIONS' | translate }}

} @else {
@for (res of reservations; track res.id) {

{{ res.customerName }}

{{ res.startDate | date:'dd.MM.yyyy' }} – {{ res.endDate | date:'dd.MM.yyyy' }}

#{{ res.id }} @if (res.reservationStatus === 'CREATED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CREATED' | translate }} } @if (res.reservationStatus === 'PICKED_UP') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.PICKED_UP' | translate }} } @if (res.reservationStatus === 'RETURNED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.RETURNED' | translate }} } @if (res.reservationStatus === 'CANCELLED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CANCELLED' | translate }} }
{{ res.pickUpTime.substring(0, 5) }} {{ res.totalPrice | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':'de-AT' }}
}
@for (res of reservations; track res.id) {
#{{ res.id }}

{{ res.customerName }}

{{ res.startDate | date:'dd.MM.yyyy' }} – {{ res.endDate | date:'dd.MM.yyyy' }} {{ res.pickUpTime.substring(0, 5) }}
@if (res.reservationStatus === 'CREATED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CREATED' | translate }} } @if (res.reservationStatus === 'PICKED_UP') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.PICKED_UP' | translate }} } @if (res.reservationStatus === 'RETURNED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.RETURNED' | translate }} } @if (res.reservationStatus === 'CANCELLED') { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CANCELLED' | translate }} }
{{ res.totalPrice | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':'de-AT' }}
}
} }
@if (showDeleteModal && equipment) {
